历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 734 → 1027 → 825 → 1973 → 1102, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant drop to 1973, but it rebounded to 1102 in 2025. The fluctuations in the past two years have been relatively large, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 1102. The enrollment plan for science/physics category in this province was 42 in 2021 → 51 in 2022 → 50 in 2023 → 49 in 2024 → 52 in 2025, and the plan for 2026 is 60, an increase of about 15.4% compared to 2025. The expansion is significant and has a certain alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 18th (Top 20), and in recent years, its ranking has been stable in the 14–18 range, indicating a top-tier university level. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (such as data fabrication in papers). However, the reputation evaluation for 2025 was also somewhat negative (abnormal admission分数线), and negative public opinion has persisted but not significantly worsened. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 26th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, indicating moderate attention from applicants. It has A+ disciplines in Civil Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Environmental Science and Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering, as well as A in Architecture and A in Computer Science and Technology, with a total of 17 disciplines rated A- or above. Its academic strength is formidable, making it highly attractive to engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, which aligns well with Tongji University's engineering strengths. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in this province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal to Shaanxi examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 1102, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 15.4% (alleviating competition), and the 19.7% increase in physics category examinees (intensifying competition), the expansion rate is slightly smaller than the examinee growth rate, leading to a slight overall intensification of competition. Taking into account the somewhat negative reputation and sustained popularity of majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1234, with a range of 1111–1357.

If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1357), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options to avoid the risk of not being admitted.

学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 18th. prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 同济大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校。学校位于上海市，综合实力雄厚，其医学学科依托同济大学整体平台 优势，在临床医学、基础医学等领域具有较高声誉，对陕西考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来全国报考热度持续上升，临床医学（5+3一体化）等长学制培养模式备受高分考生青睐。同济大学医学类在陕西省招生规模较小（12人），属于稀缺招生计划， 竞争激烈。上海的地域优势进一步推高了报考热度，使得位次虽因扩招后移但仍处于较高水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素，2026年同济大学医学类在陕西省最低录取位次预计为3097位，较2025年（3047位）小幅后移约50位。位次区间预计在2973位至3221位之间。计划持平但医学热度 不减，加之近年位次持续下沉的趋势惯性，预计2026年位次将保持稳中略降（位次数字略增大）的态势。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Tongji University's medical category in Shaanxi Province over the past four years are: 987th in 2022 (planned 6 students), 1145th in 2023 (planned 7 students), 2822nd in 2024 (planned 9 students), and 3047th in 2025 (planned 12 students). Over the four years, the ranking has continuously and significantly declined, from 987th to 3047th, reflecting the downward effect on rankings caused by the gradual expansion of medical enrollment plans (6→7→9→12). In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is 12 students, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend, but the cumulative impact of recent expansions has already placed the ranking in a relatively low range.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and has been selected for the national Double First-Class construction initiative. Located in Shanghai, the university has strong overall strength. Its medical disciplines, leveraging the platform advantages of Tongji University, enjoy a high reputation in fields such as clinical medicine and basic medicine, and continue to attract Shaanxi candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the national popularity of medical majors has been rising, with long-term training models such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) favored by high-scoring candidates. Tongji University's medical category has a small enrollment scale in Shaanxi Province (12 students), making it a scarce enrollment plan with intense competition. The geographical advantage of Shanghai further boosts application enthusiasm, keeping the ranking at a relatively high level despite the decline due to expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors, the minimum admission ranking for Tongji University's medical category in Shaanxi Province in 2026 is expected to be 3097th, a slight decline of about 50 places from 2025 (3047th). The ranking range is estimated to be between 2973rd and 3221st. With the plan unchanged but medical popularity undiminished, and the inertia of the continuous downward trend in recent years, the ranking in 2026 is expected to remain stable with a slight decrease (ranking number slightly increasing).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) has the highest ranking requirement, suitable for candidates with rankings within 2900 as a reach; the Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Medicine, etc.) is the main enrollment force, and candidates with rankings around 3000 can consider it as a priority; the Guohao Elite Class (Basic Medicine) has a relatively lower ranking and can serve as a safety choice.
